basic_details.job_title: GSFC University Director Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

basic_details.short_information: Published recently, GSFC University invites applications from highly experienced professionals for the key leadership position of Director - Administration. This is a senior-level regular appointment with 3 years tenure (renewable) at the University located in Vadodara, Gujarat. Individuals with 20-25 years of strong administrative experience in higher education or industry are encouraged to apply. Find complete details about GSFC University Director Administration Recruitment 2026 including eligibility, roles & responsibilities, selection process, remuneration, and application guidelines here

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Director Administration Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: GSFC University, incorporated under the Gujarat Private Universities (Second Amendment) Act 2009, has released the Job Description and recruitment details for the post of Director - Administration. The University focuses on skill development, industry-aligned education in Engineering, Science, and Management. The selected candidate will serve as the principal administrative officer responsible for overall administration, infrastructure, HR, compliance, and institutional development. Download GSFC University Director Administration Recruitment Notification PDF

rows.gsfc_university_vadodara: Regular Appointment (3 years tenure, renewable) with 1-year probation
As per University guidelines (Check official notification)
Written Ability Test + Personal Interview + Case Study Presentation
Market-driven, commensurate with qualification & experience (Core Salary + PF + Incentives + Group Insurance + Medical benefits)

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Recruitment 2026 Important Dates
content_sections.text: (Exact dates will be updated on the official website. Candidates are advised to visit regularly.)

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Director Administration Roles & Responsibilities
content_sections.text: The Director (Administration) shall act as the principal administrative officer exercising general superintendence and control over university affairs. Key responsibilities include: Overall planning & management of infrastructure projects (academic, co-curricular, administrative) Recruitment, HR management, career planning, training, performance evaluation (APLI), disciplinary actions Policy formulation, grievance redressal, public relations & marketing Liaison with sponsoring body, industries, government departments & educational institutions Management of university assets, properties, repair & maintenance Non-academic statutory compliances, filing of returns Procurement of materials, equipment, IT consumables & Annual Rate/ Maintenance Contracts Development & maintenance of IT infrastructure and website Coordination for student internships, campus placement cell & co-curricular activities Preparation of Annual Report and execution of Institutional Development Plan Any other duties assigned by Governing Body / President

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Director Administration Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Educational Qualification: Bachelor’s Degree from a recognized university with minimum 55% marks or equivalent grade in any discipline. Preferred: Post Graduate Degree in Management / HRM / Finance. Law & Finance background is desirable. Experience: 20–25 years of relevant administrative/management experience in academic administration at university level or in industries. Minimum 10 years in a senior managerial role independently handling administration of an educational institute or business unit. Expertise in facility management, operations, HR, finance, budgeting, policy implementation, and inter-departmental coordination. Age Limit: 50 years as on 01st January 2026.

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Recruitment 2026 Remuneration & Benefits
content_sections.text: Pay and perks will be highly competitive and commensurate with skills, qualification, and experience. Components include: Core Salary PF as per statutory norms Performance-based increments as per PMS policy Group Mediclaim Insurance & Group Personal Accident Policy Medical treatment at GSFC Medical Center

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Director Administration Selection Process
content_sections.text: Stage 1: Written Ability Test (50 marks, 20 minutes) Essay/Application/Paragraph on given topic. Qualifying marks: 30. Tests grammar, content, handwriting & punctuation. Stage 2: Personal Interview Shortlisted candidates will receive Case Study/Assignment in advance. Candidates must prepare PPT and present during interview. Focus on problem-solving, competencies & approach to real-world university administration issues. Final selection based on overall performance.

content_sections.heading: GSFC University Recruitment 2026 Tenure of Appointment
content_sections.text: Regular appointment for 3 years. Initial probation/observation period of 1 year. Extendable/renewable for another term of 3 years based on performance assessment.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for GSFC University Director Administration Post
content_sections.text: Candidates with the required profile should send their detailed CV / Application along with supporting documents to the official email or portal as mentioned in the latest notification on the GSFC University website. Mention “Application for Director - Administration” in the subject line. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Applicants
content_sections.text: This is a senior leadership position demanding strategic vision and hands-on administrative expertise. Only candidates meeting the exact experience criteria are encouraged to apply. The University reserves the right to reject any application without assigning reasons. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. All information provided must be true; false information will result in rejection at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GSFC University Director Administration Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date will be announced on the official website. Candidates should regularly check gsfcuni.edu.in for updates.

faq.question: Q2. What is the age limit for Director Administration at GSFC University?
faq.answer: Maximum 50 years as on 01st January 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary for Director Administration post at GSFC University Vadodara?
faq.answer: Highly competitive and market-driven, including core salary, PF, performance incentives, group insurance, and medical benefits.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum experience required for GSFC University Director Administration?
faq.answer: 20–25 years of relevant experience with at least 10 years in senior managerial/administrative role in university or industry.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for GSFC University Director post?
faq.answer: Written Ability Test (50 marks) + Personal Interview with Case Study Presentation.

faq.question: Q6. Is the Director Administration post permanent or contractual at GSFC University?
faq.answer: It is a regular appointment for 3 years (renewable) with 1-year probation.

faq.question: Q7. What qualifications are needed for GSFC University Director Administration 2026?
faq.answer: Bachelor’s degree (55% marks) + preferably PG in Management/HRM/Finance. Law & Finance background is preferred.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the location for GSFC University Director Administration job?
faq.answer: Vadodara, Gujarat.

faq.question: Q9. What are the key responsibilities of Director Administration at GSFC University?
faq.answer: Overall university administration, HR, infrastructure, procurement, statutory compliance, industry liaison, placement cell, and institutional development.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for GSFC University Vadodara Director Recruitment?
faq.answer: Submit detailed CV/application through the official channel mentioned on the university website. Prepare for Written Test and Case Study-based Interview.
